questionHtml:
Vanadium forms a body centred cubic (BCC) crystal structure with an edge length of 303 pm, (303 × 10−12 m).

Deduce the number of atoms per unit cell in vanadium.

meta.title: Deduce the number of atoms per unit cell in vanadium.
breadcrumbLabels: A.8 Superconducting metals and X-ray crystallography (HL only)
